description:
Authenticator to generate 2-step verification codes using your YubiKey

Authenticator to generate 2-step verification codes using your YubiKey
- Accessibility: comprehensive improvements for screen reader support and visual accessibility
- New translations: Bulgarian and Hebrew.
- Fix(OTP): character counter now counts bytes for multi-byte characters.
- Fix(android): NFC HAL crash on startup.
- Android: Added landscape orientation support.
- Android: Redesigned QR scanner UI.
- Binaries compiled with Flutter 3.44.1 and Python 3.14.5 (desktop).
